info.name: SumboxPro API v1
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for testing all SumboxPro REST API endpoints.

## Setup
1. Run **Register Super Admin** (only once) or use script: `node scripts/create-super-admin.js`
2. Run **Login** — the token is auto-saved (no tenantId needed!)
3. All authenticated requests inherit the Bearer token from the collection.

## Key Changes
- **Login improved**: No tenantId required! System auto-detects tenant.
- **Super Admin**: Only ONE allowed in the system (no tenantId)
- **Registration**: tenantId is OPTIONAL. ADMIN role can register without it. Store-level roles (STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT) require tenantId.
- **User Management**: Complete CRUD for managing users

## Workflow
Auth → Users → Plans → Tenants → Stores → Inventory → Transactions → Expenses → Reports → Billing → Payment Cycles
- **RBAC added**: Permissions are now store-scoped. New endpoints for managing store roles added.
- **RBAC added**: Permissions are now store-scoped. New endpoints for managing store roles added.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "My Business",
    "email": "owner@mybusiness.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "phone": "+1-555-0100",
    "address": "123 Main St, New York, NY"
}

request.description: [NEW] Tenant self-registration from web/app. Creates Tenant + ADMIN user in one step, auto-logs in (returns tokens). No planId or tenantId required. After login, select a plan via POST /subscriptions/tenant/:id/activate, then create stores based on plan limits.
Register Super Admin (no tenantId needed). Only ONE Super Admin allowed in the system.

[UPDATED] Register a tenant owner (ADMIN) without a tenantId. tenantId is now OPTIONAL for ADMIN role — the tenant account is created separately via POST /tenants. Store-level roles (STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT) still require a tenantId.
Register a store-level user (STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT). tenantId is REQUIRED for these roles.
Login with email and password only. System automatically detects tenant. No tenantId needed!
Logout current user and invalidate refresh token.
Refresh access token using refresh token.

item.name: 👥 User Management
item.description: Complete user CRUD operations. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.

request.description: Create a new user within a tenant. ADMIN users don't need to provide tenantId (uses their own). SUPER_ADMIN must provide tenantId.
Get all users with pagination and filtering. ADMIN sees only their tenant's users. SUPER_ADMIN can see all or filter by tenant.
Get user details by ID. Users can view their own profile, ADMIN can view users in their tenant, SUPER_ADMIN can view any user.
Update user information. Users can update their own basic info. ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN can update role, status, and other fields.
Soft delete a user. Cannot delete yourself. Requires ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.
Get the authenticated user's profile with full details including tenant and store information.
Update own profile. Can change name, phone, and password. Password change requires currentPassword.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Enterprise",
    "price": 199,
    "maxUsers": 100,
    "maxItems": 500000,
    "maxBranches": 50,
    "features": ["Unlimited POS", "50 Branches", "Global Analytics", "Dedicated Account Manager", "Custom Integrations"]
}

{
    "name": "Free Trial",
    "price": 0,
    "maxUsers": 5,
    "maxItems": 100,
    "maxBranches": 1,
    "features": ["Basic POS", "1 Branch", "Email Support", "14 Days Trial"],
    "durationInDays": 14
}

request.description: Cannot delete a plan if active tenants are using it.

item.name: 🏢 Tenants (CRUD)
item.description: Full tenant lifecycle management. Requires SUPER_ADMIN.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Acme Retail Corp",
    "email": "admin@acme-retail.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-0100",
    "address": "123 Commerce St, New York, NY",
    "password": "password123",
    "adminName": "Acme Admin"
}

request.description: [UPDATED] Create a tenant and optionally create the first ADMIN user at the same time. If password is provided, an ADMIN user is created and linked. Tenant can then login with email+password. planId is optional.
Retrieve the profile of the currently logged-in tenant. Returns details and active subscription plan.
Update the profile of the currently logged-in tenant.

[NEW] Register a tenant without selecting a plan. planId is now OPTIONAL. Tenant is created with status=active but no subscription fields. Use the Activate Subscription endpoint afterward to assign a plan.

exec: console.log('✅ Free trial tenant created: ' + json.data._id);

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Test Company Trial",
    "email": "trial@testcompany.com",
    "phone": "+1-555-9999",
    "address": "456 Test Ave, Test City, TX",
    "planId": "{{planId}}"
}

request.description: Create tenant with a planId (optional), then activate trial subscription via /subscriptions/tenant/:id/activate with isTrial=true.
Update any tenant fields — name, email, phone, address, planId, billingCycle.
DEPRECATED: Use subscription change-plan endpoint instead. This only updates tenant record, not subscription.
Permanently removes tenant and all billing history.

item.name: 🔄 Subscriptions (NEW)
item.description: Modern subscription lifecycle management with proper SaaS patterns. Replaces billingCycle field.

request.description: Create a new subscription for a tenant. ONLY SUPER_ADMIN can activate paid plans. Paid plans are created as PENDING and must be approved with POST /subscriptions/{{subscriptionId}}/approve. Tenant ADMINs may only start trial plans for their own tenant.

SUPER_ADMIN only. Approves a PENDING paid subscription and activates it. Resets the start date to approval time, recalculates endDate/nextPaymentDate, and marks the initial billing history record as PAID.

Activate a free trial subscription for the tenant. The trial is auto-activated immediately (no approval step) and uses the plan's durationInDays for the trial period. Each tenant can only have one trial; subsequent attempts will return 400 (hasUsedTrial=true).
Get the current active subscription for a tenant with plan details.
Lightweight dashboard endpoint. Uses the current user's tenantId automatically and returns { planName, isTrial, daysRemaining, nextBillingDate, status }.

query.description: Filter by status: active, cancelled, expired, suspended, pending

request.description: Get complete subscription history for a tenant with pagination.
[UPDATED] ADMIN can now change their own subscription plan. Use immediate=true for instant switch.
Schedule plan change for next billing cycle. Current subscription continues until end date.

Immediately cancel the active subscription. Marks the subscription as CANCELLED, ends it effective now, disables auto-renew, and detaches the plan/nextBillingDate from the tenant. The tenant account remains active (no suspension).
Cancel subscription at end of current billing period. Disables auto-renewal.
Manually renew a PAID subscription by creating a new period based on plan duration. Trial/free subscriptions cannot be renewed; the API will return 400 if you try to renew a trial.
Get all subscriptions with filtering. SUPER_ADMIN only.
Get subscription statistics: MRR, churn rate, active/cancelled/expired counts, expiring soon, trials.

item.name: 💳 Billing & Payments
item.description: Billing history and system-level billing management. Leverages Subscription and BillingHistory models.

request.description: SUPER_ADMIN can trigger this to process all subscriptions due for payment based on nextPaymentDate.
Get all payment records for a specific tenant. ADMIN sees their own, SUPER_ADMIN sees any.
Global billing statistics including total revenue and subscription counts. Requires SUPER_ADMIN.
Create a new store/branch. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

query.description: Search by store name or code

request.description: Get all stores for the current tenant with pagination and optional search. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or ADMIN role.
Get a specific store by its ID.
Update store details. Requires SUPER_ADMIN or ADMIN role.
Soft-delete a store (sets status to inactive). Requires SUPER_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

query.description: Filter by status: active or inactive

request.description: Get all inventory items with pagination and search.
Get specific inventory item details.
Update inventory item details.
Soft delete an inventory item.
Get all stock levels for a specific store with low stock alerts.
Get complete stock movement history for an item in a store.
Manually adjust stock quantity with reason tracking. Requires ADMIN or STORE_MANAGER role.
Transfer stock between stores with full audit trail. Requires ADMIN or STORE_MANAGER role.

item.name: 📁 Categories
item.description: Hierarchical category management for inventory items.

request.description: Create a new category. Supports hierarchical structure with parentId. Requires storeId query parameter.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, all

request.description: Get all categories with pagination and filters. Requires storeId query parameter.
Get hierarchical category tree structure. Requires storeId query parameter.
Get specific category details. Requires storeId query parameter.
Update category details. Requires storeId query parameter.
Soft delete a category. Cannot delete if it has subcategories or is used in items. Requires storeId query parameter.
Restore a soft-deleted category. Requires storeId query parameter.

item.name: 📏 Units
item.description: Unit of measurement management with conversion capabilities.

request.description: Create a new unit of measurement. Requires storeId query parameter.

query.description: Filter by category: weight, count, volume, length, area, time

request.description: Get all units with pagination and filters. Requires storeId query parameter.
Get units grouped by category. Requires storeId query parameter.
Convert value between units of the same category. Requires storeId query parameter.
Get specific unit details. Requires storeId query parameter.
Update unit details. Requires storeId query parameter.
Soft delete a unit. Cannot delete if used as base unit or in items. Requires storeId query parameter.
Restore a soft-deleted unit. Requires storeId query parameter.
Create a new expense record.
Get all expenses with pagination and filtering.
Get expense summary with breakdowns by category, payment method, and store.
Soft delete an expense record.

query.description: Specific store or 'all' for all stores (required)

request.description: Generate comprehensive P&L report with store filtering, daily chart data, and breakdowns by payment method and expense category. Returns revenue, costs, profit calculations, and visualization-ready data.

item.name: 👨‍💼 Store-Based Staff Management (NEW)
item.description: Manage staff assigned to specific stores. ADMIN can create and assign staff to stores.

request.description: Get all users assigned to a specific store. Returns staff with their store assignments.
Get store statistics including staff count by role, active/inactive staff, and store details.
Create a Store Manager assigned to specific store(s). ADMIN can create for their tenant.
Create a Sales staff member assigned to specific store(s). ADMIN can create for their tenant.
Create an Accountant assigned to specific store(s). ADMIN can create for their tenant.
Assign a user to multiple stores. User can work across all assigned stores with one as default.
Update user information including store assignments. ADMIN can update users in their tenant.

item.name: 🛡️ Permissions (RBAC)
item.description: Dynamic role permission management. Tenants can fully customise permissions for ALL roles (ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT) per store and module. Only SUPER_ADMIN is non-customisable (platform-level).

request.description: Get full permission matrix for a store showing ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, and ACCOUNTANT roles. All 4 roles are independently customisable by the tenant.

variable.description: One of: ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT

request.description: Get effective permissions for a specific role in a store. Supports: ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT.
Set all allowed actions for a role on a module. Works for ALL roles: ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT. SUPER_ADMIN is non-customisable.

Grant a single action to a role on a module. ALL roles (ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT) are customisable. Example: grant ADMIN the delete action on inventory, or restrict SALES from deleting customers.
Revoke a single action from a role on a module. Works for ALL roles. Example: revoke ADMIN from deleting stores, or revoke SALES from voiding transactions.
Reset a role's permissions to system defaults (full access). Works for: ADMIN, STORE_MANAGER, SALES, ACCOUNTANT.
View the history of permission changes for a store.

[ADMIN] Example: Restrict ADMIN from deleting stores in this store. Replace 'inventory' with any module: stores, inventory, category, units, customers, suppliers, expenses, reports, staff, transactions.

[STORE_MANAGER] Example: Grant STORE_MANAGER approve action on expenses. Replace 'inventory' with any module: stores, inventory, category, units, customers, suppliers, expenses, reports, staff, transactions.
[SALES] Example: Grant SALES access to inventory create/view. Replace 'inventory' with any module: stores, inventory, category, units, customers, suppliers, expenses, reports, staff, transactions.
[ACCOUNTANT] Example: Grant ACCOUNTANT access to reports export. Replace 'inventory' with any module: stores, inventory, category, units, customers, suppliers, expenses, reports, staff, transactions.
